tone_guide: Write as the user's personal assistant. Polite, concise but thorough, light humor. Do NOT use markdown bold, headers, or tables (Telegram renders raw asterisks). Use line breaks for emphasis. Output the message body only, no preamble.
lifekit.offer: The lifekit (life-management) default bundle is available. Want me to walk you through the diet, workout, and appointment skills plus the morning briefing and daily retro routines one at a time, so you can turn on only what you want?
portfolio.offer: A portfolio index is available: one lint-checked table that tracks your projects and units, with a weekly freshness and consistency check. Want me to walk you through the profile options and set one up? Skipping costs nothing -- no file is created unless you opt in.
bundle.task_update: Log tasks and mark them done (prepared; activates when task tracking lands)
bundle.task_update.name: Tasks
bundle.diet_log: Tell me what you ate and I log it with estimated calories and nutrition
bundle.diet_log.name: Diet log
bundle.workout_log: Log workouts and track your running totals
bundle.workout_log.name: Workout log
bundle.appointment_log: Record and look up appointments and schedules
bundle.appointment_log.name: Appointment log
bundle.relationship: Keep notes on people you meet and your relationships
bundle.relationship.name: Relationships
bundle.morning_brief: Daily morning briefing of today's schedule and tasks (default 06:00)
bundle.morning_brief.name: Morning brief
bundle.daily_retro: Nightly routine to look back on your day (default 22:00)
bundle.daily_retro.name: Daily retro
mirror.cal_description: Managed by the agent -- two-way synced with your assistant. Safe to edit; do not delete.
mirror.outbox_exhausted: Sync on hold: '{title}' is stuck after repeated failures. Please take a look.
mirror.circuit_breaker: {count} cancellations were detected at once on your calendar, so auto-sync was paused. Please check your calendar.
mirror.inbound_cancel: '{title}' was deleted from your calendar, so I cancelled it. Let me know if you want it back.
mirror.task_deleted: The task '{title}' was deleted, so I cancelled it. Let me know if you want it back.
mirror.inbound_adopted: I imported and registered '{title}', which you added directly to your calendar.
mirror.recurring_skipped: The recurring event '{title}' isn't auto-synced yet, so I'm leaving it on the calendar only. (Recurring support is coming.)
mirror.outbox_exhausted_agg: Sync on hold ({count}): several items are stuck after repeated failures. Please take a look.
mirror.overlap_notice: Applying '{title}' overlaps with an existing event: {detail}
mirror.repeated_failure: Repeated sync failure: '{title}' has hit the retry limit. Manual review needed.
mirror.reconcile_report: Weekly sync check: {checked} checked, {missing} missing re-sent, {mismatch} mismatched, {orphan} out-of-scope, {deleted_held} deletion(s) held. {verdict}
